note: filenames keyed to CANONICAL sheet row; 'serves' lists reuse placements; wiring = orchestrator #108

entries.what: Zn/Cu galvanic cell (beakers, electrodes, wire+voltmeter 1.10 V, KNO3 salt bridge) with 4 blank '?' boxes: electrode roles, salt-bridge function, e- direction slot
entries.answer_leak_check: PASS: no anode/cathode text, no electron-flow or ion-flow arrows, no +/- terminal marks; only prompt-given facts drawn (metals, solutions, 1.10 V, KNO3)

entries.what: Before/After particulate panels for N2+3H2->2NH3: Before drawn with 4 N2 + 12 H2; After panel empty dashed (student draws the 50/75/100%-yield state)
entries.answer_leak_check: PASS: After panel contains zero particles; no NH3 drawn anywhere; no leftover counts hinted

entries.what: Before/After particulate panels for 2H2+O2->2H2O: Before drawn with 3 H2 + 2 O2; After empty dashed (student identifies limiting reactant and draws products + leftover)
entries.answer_leak_check: PASS: After panel empty; limiting reactant not marked; no H2O drawn

entries.what: Before/After panels: After drawn with 2 NH3 + 2 leftover H2 (as given in cell); Before empty dashed (student works backwards to initial N2/H2 counts)
entries.answer_leak_check: PASS: Before panel empty; initial counts (the answer) appear nowhere; After contents are verbatim the given state

entries.what: C2H4 skeletal framework: C-C single line + 4 C-H bonds, atom letters only
entries.answer_leak_check: PASS: no double bond, no electron dots/lone pairs, neutral 4-corner H placement (does not telegraph sp2 planarity answer)

entries.what: Filtration apparatus (stand, ring, funnel + filter paper with solid dots, conical flask with filtrate) with 2 blank '?' boxes at paper+solid and liquid-in-flask
entries.answer_leak_check: PASS: no 'residue'/'filtrate' text; no equipment names either (keeps asset reusable for row 146 name-the-equipment)

entries.what: Cl mass spectrum: peaks at m/z 35 (75%) and 37 (25%), y scale 0-100, tick numbers shown; axis-label positions are blank '?' boxes
entries.answer_leak_check: PASS: no 'm/z' / 'relative abundance' axis text (that IS the task); peaks carry no isotope labels

entries.what: Partial Br mass spectrum: peak at m/z 79 (~50%) drawn, axes labeled (given), tick mark at 81 with empty space
entries.answer_leak_check: PASS: no peak, ghost, or height hint at m/z 81 (drawing it is the exercise)

entries.what: Blank mass-spectrum axes (m/z vs relative abundance 0-100) with ticks at 35 and 37
entries.answer_leak_check: PASS: no peaks drawn; 3:1 ratio appears nowhere

entries.what: Stoichiometric graph: g NH3 produced vs g N2 added, linear rise then plateau
entries.answer_leak_check: PASS: no marker/label at the kink, no region annotations (locating them is the task); axis labels are given in cell text

entries.what: Data table: Mg added 1.0-4.0 g vs MgO formed 1.66/3.32/4.98/4.98 g
entries.answer_leak_check: PASS: plateau rows styled identically to linear rows (spotting the flattening is the task); no limiting-reactant annotation

entries.what: Blank potential-energy vs reaction-coordinate axes
entries.answer_leak_check: PASS: no levels, humps, or dH arrows; endo/exo direction not hinted

entries.what: Blank concentration-time axes for N2+3H2<=>2NH3 with dashed stressor markers at t=30 s (N2 added) and t=60 s (T increased, dH<0) - all given in cell
entries.answer_leak_check: PASS: no concentration curves before or after stressors; no arrows or shift-direction cues

entries.what: Concentration-time axes with given starting points [N2]0=1.00, [H2]0=3.00, [NH3]0=0 and dashed guide at [NH3]eq=0.40 M; no curves
entries.answer_leak_check: PASS: consumed amounts (0.20/0.60 M) and final [N2]/[H2] guides NOT drawn - computing/drawing them is the task

entries.what: Blank M-B axes: x = molecular energy, y = fraction of molecules (labels given in cell text)
entries.answer_leak_check: PASS: no curves; T1/T2 peak positions not hinted

entries.what: Maxwell-Boltzmann energy-distribution curve with dashed vertical at the peak and a second dashed line slightly right; 4 blank '?' boxes for x-axis, y-axis, and the two lines
entries.answer_leak_check: PASS: no 'kinetic energy'/'number of particles'/'most probable'/'average' text anywhere; the average-KE line sits right of the peak per cell text

entries.what: 4-box circular-flow skeleton (Households/Firms/Product market/Factor market) with paired connector lines, arrowheads omitted
entries.answer_leak_check: PASS: no arrowheads, no flow labels, no teal/amber money-vs-real colour coding (assigning direction + flows IS the exercise)

entries.what: P-Q axes with original demand curve D1 only
entries.answer_leak_check: PASS: no D2, no shift arrows, no direction hint; drawing the shifted curve is the exercise

entries.what: P-Q axes with original supply curve S1 only
entries.answer_leak_check: PASS: no S2, no shift arrows, no direction hint

entries.what: Blank Price/Quantity axes (family asset for the econ draw-a-market cue corpus)
entries.answer_leak_check: PASS: axes + given labels only

entries.what: Blank two-good PPC axes (generic Good X / Good Y so one asset serves every PPC cue)
entries.answer_leak_check: PASS: no curve, no intercepts, no bow direction
